items.claim: Terrence McKinney has a high finishing rate, having not gone past the first round in his last seven fights.
items.quote: this guy hasn't been out of the first round in man about seven fights. He either finishes his opponent or he gets finished.

items.claim: Terrence McKinney's primary advantage is his ability to land takedowns and utilize ground and pound.
items.quote: I think Terrence McKenna is going to land takedowns at some point and utilize the ground and pound. That's his weapon. That's his advantage in this fight

items.claim: Brandon Royval has a 45% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: Roy Vall's got a 45% takedown defense.

items.claim: Loner Kavanagh has a 94% takedown defense rate.
Cory Sandhagen's takedown defense percentage dropped to 56% after being taken down 20 times by Merab Dvalishvili.
items.quote: all of a sudden Morab Devalos really came in and took him down 20 times so it dropped that thing way back down to 56%.

items.claim: Mario Bautista has a slight edge in takedown volume over Cory Sandhagen.
items.quote: Bautista nearly two takedowns over three rounds. Sanhagen gets one every three. So, you know, slight edge for Bautista

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has a significant advantage in the takedown game over Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: the takedown game goes to Saint Deni who lands like a takedown and a half per around.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has a poor takedown defense rate of 44%.
items.quote: the takedown defense of Patty the Batty's important here, right? 44%. That's not very good.

items.claim: Max Holloway has a higher significant strike output per minute than Conor McGregor.
items.quote: Holloway nearly seven significant strikes per minute. McGregor 5.3 per minute.

items.claim: Max Holloway has a higher takedown defense rate than Conor McGregor.
